title: DRCR/1 result envelope (kind drcr-result, v 1)
description: The sealed conclusion a crowd-research participant returns to the organizer. Sealed to the campaign's project PUBLIC key (ECDH P-256 -> HKDF-SHA-256 -> AES-256-GCM); only the organizer's private key opens it. Normative prose: docs/CROWD-RESEARCH.md sections 5-6. Reference implementation: public/js/research-seal-core.js. This schema describes the OUTER envelope (the wire form); the inner plaintext (answer/sources/notes) is described in docs/CROWD-RESEARCH.md section 5.3 and is only visible after decryption.

kid.description: Campaign key id: first 8 lowercase-hex chars of SHA-256(raw project public key). Routing hint only, never load-bearing for security.

epk.description: base64url of the ephemeral P-256 public key (raw uncompressed point, 65 bytes). Fresh per seal; also the HKDF salt.

ct.description: base64url of the AES-256-GCM ciphertext (the UTF-8 JSON result plaintext, GCM tag appended). Opens only with the organizer's campaign private key.
